category_sources: Official i2pd documentation describes i2pd as an I2P daemon/client for anonymous I2P networks.
source_facts.description says i2pd is a full-featured C++ implementation of an I2P client.
display_name_sources: Official i2pd documentation title and project site use i2pd.
docs_sources: Official i2pd Read the Docs site is the dedicated documentation surface linked for the project.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated as https://github.com/PurpleI2P/i2pd; per instruction repo is returned as null and not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: Official i2pd docs describe anonymous, encrypted I2P networking and daemon/client usage.
source_facts.description identifies a C++ I2P client.
